page: Microsoft Azure M96s_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MSMediumMemoryv3 server family. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor, this instance features 96 dedicated virtual CPUs and is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is designed specifically for workloads requiring massive memory footprints relative to compute resources, offering a total of 1946.0 GB of RAM, which translates to 20.27 GB of memory per core.

This server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external solid-state drives to meet demanding input/output requirements. The absence of local storage and graphics hardware represents a design tradeoff that optimizes the instance for pure memory-bound and CPU-bound database workloads rather than local file processing or accelerated graphics tasks.

Given its hardware profile, the M96s_2_v3 is highly cost-efficient for enterprise-scale database systems, large-scale in-memory caching layers, and complex enterprise resource planning installations. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio ensures that large datasets can remain entirely in system memory, reducing latency associated with disk access. Appropriate workloads include large relational databases, SAP HANA, in-memory analytics, and heavy data warehousing operations.
description: Microsoft Azure M96s_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSMediumMemoryv3 family, featuring 96 dedicated x86_64 Intel vCPUs and a substantial 1946.0 GB of RAM. This configuration provides 20.27 GB of memory per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise applications. The instance runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, though it is Premium Storage capable for attaching high-performance external drives. This hardware profile represents a qualitative cost-efficiency tradeoff, prioritizing massive memory capacity and dedicated compute over local disk space or graphics acceleration. The M96s_2_v3 is engineered for demanding workloads such as large-scale relational databases, in-memory data analytics, SAP HANA deployments, and enterprise-grade data warehousing.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96s_2_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1946 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for large-scale enterprise database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M96s_2_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 96 Intel vCPUs and 1946 GB of RAM, designed for large in-memory database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring ninety-six dedicated cores and nearly two terabytes of RAM for enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 1946.0 GB of system memory providing 20.27 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance external disk attachment
No local storage or GPU resources included
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
